objective: Prepare a Builder self-build pack that reads the first agent production PROGRAM.json and creates an execution plan for producing an agent from that program.
scope: validate that the program contains the required production fields
copy validate_agent_program_executor_v1.ps1 into validators only at Builder runtime
write AGENT_PROGRAM_EXECUTOR_V1 proof and report only after validation evidence
complete PHASE71 task and capability only after validation evidence
validation: PowerShell parser check passes for PHASE71 APPLY.ps1
PowerShell parser check passes for PHASE71 validator payload
generated_agents, agent_catalog, and agent_programs files are not changed during preparation
forbidden_scope: do not create a second agent
do not change GitHub workflow files
do not modify old proof/report files
do not commit or push during preparation
do not run PHASE71 runtime during preparation
